lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਨਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਪੰਡਿਤ ਪੜਨਿ ਰਖੀਸੁਰ ਜੁਗੁ ਜੁਗੁ ਵੇਦਾ ਨਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: gaavan tudhano panddit parran rakheesur jug jug vedaa naale |
lines.english: The Pandits, the religious scholars who recite the Vedas, with the supreme sages of all the ages, sing of You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਨਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਜਤੀ ਸਤੀ ਸੰਤੋਖੀ ਗਾਵਨਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਵੀਰ ਕਰਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: gaavan tudhano jatee satee santokhee gaavan tudhano veer karaare |
lines.english: The celibates, the fanatics, and the peacefully accepting sing of You; the fearless warriors sing of You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਨਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਮੋਹਣੀਆ ਮਨੁ ਮੋਹਨਿ ਸੁਰਗੁ ਮਛੁ ਪਇਆਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: gaavan tudhano mohaneea man mohan surag machh peaale |
lines.english: The Mohinis, the enchanting heavenly beauties who entice hearts in paradise, in this world, and in the underworld of the subconscious, sing of You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਨਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਰਤਨ ਉਪਾਏ ਤੇਰੇ ਅਠਸਠਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਨਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: gaavan tudhano ratan upaae tere atthasatth teerath naale |
lines.english: The celestial jewels created by You, and the sixty-eight sacred shrines of pilgrimage, sing of You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਨਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਜੋਧ ਮਹਾਬਲ ਸੂਰਾ ਗਾਵਨਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਖਾਣੀ ਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: gaavan tudhano jodh mahaabal sooraa gaavan tudhano khaanee chaare |
lines.english: The brave and mighty warriors sing of You. The spiritual heroes and the four sources of creation sing of You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਨਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਖੰਡ ਮੰਡਲ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੰਡਾ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਰਖੇ ਤੇਰੇ ਧਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: gaavan tudhano khandd manddal brahamanddaa kar kar rakhe tere dhaare |
lines.english: The worlds, solar systems and galaxies, created and arranged by Your Hand, sing of You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਈ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਗਾਵਨਿ ਜੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵਨਿ ਰਤੇ ਤੇਰੇ ਭਗਤ ਰਸਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: seee tudhano gaavan jo tudh bhaavan rate tere bhagat rasaale |
lines.english: They alone sing of You, who are pleasing to Your Will. Your devotees are imbued with Your Sublime Essence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਰਿ ਕੇਤੇ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਗਾਵਨਿ ਸੇ ਮੈ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਵਨਿ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਕਿਆ ਬੀਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: hor kete tudhano gaavan se mai chit na aavan naanak kiaa beechaare |
lines.english: So many others sing of You, they do not come to mind. O Nanak, how can I think of them all?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਸੋਈ ਸਦਾ ਸਚੁ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਚੀ ਨਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: soee soee sadaa sach saahib saachaa saachee naaee |
lines.english: That True Lord is True, forever True, and True is His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗੀ ਰੰਗੀ ਭਾਤੀ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਜਿਨਸੀ ਮਾਇਆ ਜਿਨਿ ਉਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: rangee rangee bhaatee kar kar jinasee maaeaa jin upaaee |
lines.english: He created the world, with its various colors, species of beings, and the variety of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੈ ਭੀ ਹੋਸੀ ਜਾਇ ਨ ਜਾਸੀ ਰਚਨਾ ਜਿਨਿ ਰਚਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: hai bhee hosee jaae na jaasee rachanaa jin rachaaee |
lines.english: He is, and shall always be. He shall not depart, even when this Universe which He has created departs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋਈ ਕਰਸੀ ਫਿਰਿ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਕਰਣਾ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jo tis bhaavai soee karasee fir hukam na karanaa jaaee |
lines.english: He does whatever He pleases. No one can issue any order to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਦੇਖੈ ਕੀਤਾ ਆਪਣਾ ਜਿਉ ਤਿਸ ਦੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: kar kar dekhai keetaa aapanaa jiau tis dee vaddiaaee |
lines.english: Having created the creation, He watches over it Himself, by His Greatness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹੁ ਸਾਹਾ ਪਤਿਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਰਹਣੁ ਰਜਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: so paatisaahu saahaa patisaahib naanak rehan rajaaee |1|
lines.english: He is the King, the King of kings, the Supreme Lord and Master of kings. Nanak remains subject to His Will. ||1||
His Value cannot be estimated; He cannot be described.
Hearing of His Greatness, everyone calls Him Great.
But just how Great His Greatness is-this is known only to those who have seen Him.
Aasaa, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਇ ਨ ਜਾਣੈ ਤੇਰਾ ਕੇਤਾ ਕੇਵਡੁ ਚੀਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: koe na jaanai teraa ketaa kevadd cheeraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: No one knows the extent or the vastness of Your Expanse. ||1||Pause||
Those who describe You, Lord, remain immersed and absorbed in You. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡੇ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਾਹਿਬਾ ਗਹਿਰ ਗੰਭੀਰਾ ਗੁਣੀ ਗਹੀਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: vadde mere saahibaa gahir ganbheeraa gunee gaheeraa |
lines.english: O my Great Lord and Master of Unfathomable Depth, You are the Ocean of Excellence.
All the intuitives met and practiced intuitive meditation.
All the appraisers met and made the appraisal.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਤੇਰੀ ਤਿਲੁ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kehan na jaaee teree til vaddiaaee |2|
lines.english: -they cannot describe even an iota of Your Greatness. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਸਤ ਸਭਿ ਤਪ ਸਭਿ ਚੰਗਿਆਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabh sat sabh tap sabh changiaaeea |
lines.english: All Truth, all austere discipline, all goodness,
The spiritual teachers, the teachers of meditation, and the teachers of teachers
They are received only by Your Grace. No one can block them or stop their flow. ||3||
all the great miraculous spiritual powers of the Siddhas

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਵਿਣੁ ਸਿਧੀ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: tudh vin sidhee kinai na paaeea |
lines.english: without You, no one has attained such powers.
Your Praises are overflowing with Your Treasures.
What can the poor helpless creatures do?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਤੂ ਦੇਹਿ ਤਿਸੈ ਕਿਆ ਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis too dehi tisai kiaa chaaraa |
lines.english: Those, unto whom You give-how can they think of any other?
Chanting it, I live; forgetting it, I die.
O Nanak, the True One embellishes and exalts. ||4||2||
Aasaa, First Mehl:
It is so difficult to chant the True Name.
How can I forget Him, O my mother?
If someone feels hunger for the True Name,
that hunger shall consume his pain. ||1||
True is the Master, True is His Name. ||1||Pause||
Trying to describe even an iota of the Greatness of the True Name,
people have grown weary, but they have not been able to evaluate it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਾ ਨ ਹੋਵੈ ਘਾਟਿ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: vaddaa na hovai ghaatt na jaae |2|
lines.english: He would not become any greater or any lesser. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਓਹੁ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: naa ohu marai na hovai sog |
lines.english: That Lord does not die; there is no reason to mourn.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਸਭਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਕੈ ਆਖਣ ਪਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: je sabh mil kai aakhan paeh |
lines.english: Even if everyone were to gather together and speak of Him,
He continues to give, and His Provisions never run short.
As Great as You Yourself are, O Lord, so Great are Your Gifts.
This Virtue is His alone; there is no other like Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਕੋ ਹੋਆ ਨਾ ਕੋ ਹੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naa ko hoaa naa ko hoe |3|
lines.english: There never has been, and there never will be. ||3||
